Türkçe

Students of Aarhus School of Architecture will examine the historical process in the Historical Peninsula with their instructor Assoc. Prof. Dr. Naime Esra Akın.

The technical trip to Istanbul, which will be organized by the students of Aarhus School of Architecture, Aarhus University, Denmark, under the leadership of Associate Professor Naime Esra Akın, within the scope of their 2024-2025 Fall Semester projects, will be hosted by the UNESCO Chair and the Faculty of Art and Design between September 29 and October 5. Prof. Dr. Banu Manav, Prof. Dr. E. Füsun Alioğlu and Cultural Heritage Protection Doctoral Program student Y.Architect Ayşen Kaya will contribute to this program.

AAA Study Trip Fall 2024 / September 29-October 5, 2024
